title: 5 metres of 50mm, 2" Double Sided Satin Ribbon Cream, Gifts Wrap, Crafts, Party, Sew, Events, Cloth, Bows, Wedding Favours Decoration, Easter Christmas, DIY
features: Cream Satin Ribbon 50mm 2'' inch DOUBLE SIDED, 5 Meters, Double Faced, Woven Edge, Machine Washable BUY 3 & Get 1 Free, Please add any 3 and pay, will send 4th free roll with your order, MAKE sure order is placed from seller by using option 'Sold and Dispatched from Great Crafts Supplies of London'
Crafted from 100% polyester, this premium-grade ribbon features a Double-faced satin finish; it has a smooth, lustrous surface that enhances tactile appeal; ideal for a variety of craft projects

This Satin ribbon is ideal for making your own wedding stationery & favours, hand made cards and craft projects. As can be seen in the photographs, the ribbon has a smooth finish with a beautiful sheen.

Suitable for your Scrapbook, bookmarks, gift cards, ribbon bows,, Decoration on lampshade, teddy bears, hair accessories, bags, baby pram, basket handle, champagne glasses Shoes, handbags, ribbon embroidery, ribbon bracelet, make ribbons for top of gift boxes, make ribbon bows / rosebuds and many more things.
description: Our Cream RIBBON is made with the finest materials and expert craftsmanship. This Double-sided satin ribbon is carefully woven to perfection, ensuring a luxurious and elegant finish for all your projects. Versatile and Stylish: With its smooth texture and lustrous sheen, our RIBBON is perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any occasion. Whether you're embellishing gift boxes, crafting hair accessories, or creating beautiful decorations, this satin ribbon will elevate your designs to the next level.
